# NuGet Packaging and Release Expert Skill

This skill covers package structure, preview-version discipline, package consumption validation,
native asset packaging, and release-surface consistency across the pgPacTool packages.

## Use this skill when changing
- package metadata/versioning
- package layout/content
- tool packaging
- SDK packaging
- release-surface documentation
- package validation tests
